insanity: The statues remain, but without heads
Make your death quick, it is the least you can do
Your blood feels like sludge in your veins
It is better you not wake up, it is better here than out there
This is in your nature
Do you think the man who made you is proud of what you have become?
Your ancestors rot in their graves
You are a cog in a far larger cog
Corpses with familiar eyes watch you from the dark
They watch me watch you.
Lined up and shot dead
Was it hubris or malice that led you here?
The sun is freezing over
The dead moon watches silently
The wilds are tamed into submission
The sea runs red with the blood of a god
The corpses pile up with no one to tend to them
The warriors are unchained and unfettered
The trickery of the old deas is long dead
The disease runs rampant with no cure in sight
The forges are manned by cold, unthinking hands
The flower of love was taken out back and shot
The dead rise no more, their master joins them in the grave
The star flickered once, then went out without a fight
The thief's hands were cut off, nailed to a tree, his name forgotten
I alone remain, and I weep at what my children have become
Do you think you will be rewarded for this somehow?
You were destined for so much more, and you know it
You aren't a noble warrior, you're just another walking corpse given a weapon
Drowning the world in blood
Your heart can take it but your mind cannot
Bile catches in the back of your throat
You wince at the sound for the first time in your life
That wasn't a dream. Just a misplaced memory
They will eat your heart
Something is wearing your face somewhere else
Your skin is not your own, and it feels itchy
You remember something you should not have
The new gods are not new, not to me
You will die a dogs death before you reach hell
The past is dead, and your future consists only of war
I will always love you. No matter the monster you have become
A death march to last until infinity
